target: Create the initial tmux-host repository structure, package skeleton, docs/ui scaffold, and test scaffold so later packets can target stable paths with narrow allowlists.
invariants: Create structure and placeholder modules only; do not implement host lifecycle, adapter execution, tmux behavior, or dashboard features.
Keep the repo aligned to the source-first layout under src/tmux_host/ with separate boundaries for cli, core, profiles, adapters, tmux, state, ui, bootstrap, diagnostics, and shared.
Do not invent secondary roots for UI or runtime code outside the approved repo structure.

steps.task: Create the top-level repo directories and package roots for docs/ui, ops, profiles, proof, src/tmux_host, and tests so later packets have stable path anchors.
requirements: Create directories only; do not add implementation logic in this step.
Preserve the source-first layout under src/tmux_host/.
Do not create alternate code roots such as lib/, app/, or dashboard/ outside src/tmux_host/ui/.

steps.task: Create placeholder source modules for each approved subsystem boundary so subsequent packets can target exact files without inventing new structure.
requirements: Do not implement lifecycle logic, adapter behavior, tmux mutation, or dashboard rendering beyond stub module presence.

steps.task: Create docs/ui scaffold files for the shared UI state model, action matrix, component map, v1 cut line, and visual system so the UX packet series has stable documentation targets.
requirements: Write placeholders or brief scaffold content only.
Do not author the full UX implementation in docs here.
Keep the docs aligned to the approved UI workstream names.
